33:     StringBuilder builder = new StringBuilder();

35:     // Basically copied from liquibase.sqlgenerator.core.CreateIndexGenerator
36:     builder.append("CREATE ");

56:     builder.append(database.escapeTableName(statement.getTableCatalogName(), statement.getTableSchemaName(), statement.getTableName())).append("(");

<path>/workspace/liquibase-mssql/src/java/liquibase/ext/mssql/sqlgenerator/AddPrimaryKeyGeneratorMSSQL.java</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>1: package liquibase.ext.mssql.sqlgenerator;
2: 
3: import liquibase.database.Database;
4: import liquibase.ext.mssql.database.MSSQLDatabase;
5: import liquibase.ext.mssql.statement.AddPrimaryKeyStatementMSSQL;
6: import liquibase.sql.Sql;
7: import liquibase.sql.UnparsedSql;
8: import liquibase.sqlgenerator.SqlGeneratorChain;
9: import liquibase.sqlgenerator.core.AddPrimaryKeyGenerator;
10: import liquibase.statement.core.AddPrimaryKeyStatement;
11: import liquibase.structure.core.Index;
12: import liquibase.util.StringUtils;
13: 
14: public class AddPrimaryKeyGeneratorMSSQL extends AddPrimaryKeyGenerator {
15:   @Override
16:   public int getPriority() {
17:     return 15;
18:   }
19: 
20:   /**
21:    * Conditionally executes to extension's custom Primary Key SQL generation process if statement is the
22:    * AddPrimaryKeyStatementMSSQL implementation and the custom attribute (fillFactor) is set.
23:    *
24:    * Otherwise, defers to default liquibase implementation.
25:    *
26:    * @param statement
27:    * @param database
28:    * @param sqlGeneratorChain
29:    * @return
30:    */
31:   @Override
32:   public Sql[] generateSql(AddPrimaryKeyStatement statement, Database database, SqlGeneratorChain sqlGeneratorChain) {
33:     if (statement instanceof AddPrimaryKeyStatementMSSQL && ((AddPrimaryKeyStatementMSSQL) statement).getFillFactor() != null) {
34:       return generateMSSQLSql((AddPrimaryKeyStatementMSSQL)statement, database, sqlGeneratorChain);
35:     }
36: 
37:     return super.generateSql(statement, database, sqlGeneratorChain);
38:   }
39: 
40:   /**
41:    * The extension's implementation is essentially a copy/paste of the default implementation, with the following changes:
42:    *
43:    * 1) Removed other database platform specific logic other than MSSQL (purely to simplify)
44:    *
45:    * 2) Added support for setting fillFactor
46:    *
47:    * @param statement
48:    * @param database
49:    * @param sqlGeneratorChain
50:    * @return
51:    */
52:   private Sql[] generateMSSQLSql(AddPrimaryKeyStatementMSSQL statement, Database database, SqlGeneratorChain sqlGeneratorChain) {
53:     String sql;
54:     if (statement.getConstraintName() == null) {
55:       sql = "ALTER TABLE " + database.escapeTableName(statement.getCatalogName(), statement.getSchemaName(), statement.getTableName()) + " ADD PRIMARY KEY (" + database.escapeColumnNameList(statement.getColumnNames()) + ")";
56:     } else {
57:       sql = "ALTER TABLE " + database.escapeTableName(statement.getCatalogName(), statement.getSchemaName(), statement.getTableName()) + " ADD CONSTRAINT " + database.escapeConstraintName(statement.getConstraintName())+" PRIMARY KEY";
58:       if (!statement.isClustered()) {
59:         sql += " NONCLUSTERED";
60:       }
61:       sql += " (" + database.escapeColumnNameList(statement.getColumnNames()) + ")";
62:     }
63: 
64:     // the only new feature being added is support for fillFactor
65:     sql += " WITH (FILLFACTOR = " + statement.getFillFactor() + ")";
66: 
67:     if (StringUtils.trimToNull(statement.getTablespace()) != null && database.supportsTablespaces()) {
68:       sql += " ON "+statement.getTablespace();
69:     }
70: 
71:     if (statement.getForIndexName() != null) {
72:       sql += " USING INDEX "+database.escapeObjectName(statement.getForIndexCatalogName(), statement.getForIndexSchemaName(), statement.getForIndexName(), Index.class);
73:     }
74: 
75:     return new Sql[] {
76:         new UnparsedSql(sql, getAffectedPrimaryKey(statement))
77:     };
78:   }
79: 
80:   @Override
81:   public boolean supports(AddPrimaryKeyStatement statement, Database database) {
82:     return database instanceof MSSQLDatabase;
83:   }
84: 
85: }

(End of file - total 85 lines)
</content>
